flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Quinsigamond Community College rose 15% between 2017 and 2020 ($14.4k → $16.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Quinsigamond Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Quinsigamond Community College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (5.7k → 6.4k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Quinsigamond Community College rose 12% between 2006 and 2009 (49.0% → 54.7%).
